get.description: Recent house-level history for every greenhouse in one request — the batched seed the fleet-overview cards merge with the live WebSocket edge, instead of one telemetry query per card (avoids an N+1 across the fleet). The trailing `window` is resolved per greenhouse against its own latest stored (simulated) timestamp, so each card seeds with data the simulation clock has actually produced. Readings are server-downsampled (bucketed averages, ~a few dozen points per greenhouse); the bucket width is chosen from the window, so there is no interval parameter. `metric` optionally selects the house-level metric (default temperature). The response `from`/`to` report the bounding span of the returned points. An unknown window or metric is rejected with 422.

200.description: Recent history for every greenhouse with data in the window.
